svg.aria-label: How my projects fit together: netbox extended by 5 NetBox plugins (netbox-proxbox base plus netbox-ceph, netbox-pbs, netbox-pdm, netbox-packer) flowing into proxbox-api, which forks to netbox-sdk and proxmox-sdk; those SDKs speak REST to NetBox and to Proxmox VE plus its Ceph, PBS, and PDM service APIs.
